title: T-004 — UI: customer_detail_page (SHIP-002) with contacts/addresses/allergens tabs (11-shipping-a)
prompt:
# T-004 — Customer Detail page UI

PRD: docs/prd/11-SHIPPING-PRD.md §15.4 SHIP-003 Shipping Addresses, §15.4 SHIP-004 Allergen Restrictions, §3 Personas, §11 V-SHIP-SO-02
UX: prototypes/design/11-SHIPPING-UX.md §3 SHIP-002 — Customer Detail
Prototype: prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/customer-screens.jsx:132-363 (customer_detail_page)
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Server Component page `/(shipping)/customers/[id]` with 4-tab layout (Overview / Addresses / Allergens / Pricing[P2 scaffolded]) matching prototype 1:1 with shadcn primitives.

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/web/app/(shipping)/customers/[id]/page.tsx` (RSC) fetches customer + contacts + addresses + allergen restrictions in parallel under `withOrgContext`.
2. Tab routing via `?tab=overview|addresses|allergens|pricing` URL param (preserves on refresh).
3. Addresses tab: list shipping/billing addresses + "Add Address" button → `address_modal` (Dialog from `packages/ui` translated from `modals.jsx:69-94`).
4. Allergens tab: chips list of `customer_allergen_restrictions` + "Add Restriction" → `allergen_restriction_modal` (Dialog from `modals.jsx:96-113`); QA role only for write.
5. Pricing tab: render `Pricing tab on Customer Detail is ScaffoldedScreen` (BL-SHIP-09 P2) — Phase badge + placeholder Card.
6. V-SHIP-SO-02 inline-warn banner if no shipping address exists (advisory; server-side guard runs at SO confirm).
7. Four states (empty/loading/error/permission) per tab.

## Prototype parity
Reference: `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/customer-screens.jsx:132-363` (customer_detail_page). Verify:
- Top breadcrumb + customer header (name, code, badge)
- 4-tab nav (Overview / Addresses / Allergens / Pricing[P2])
- Overview tab: contact card + summary card (total orders, last order, credit_limit P2 badge)
- Addresses tab: list + Add button + V-SHIP-SO-02 banner if empty shipping
- Allergens tab: chip list + Add button (gated by ship.allergen.override)
- Pricing tab: ScaffoldedScreen with P2 badge

Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale.

## Files
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/customers/[id]/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/customers/[id]/_components/customer-detail-tabs.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/customers/[id]/_components/address-list.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/customers/[id]/_components/allergen-restrictions-list.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/(shipping)/customers/[id]/_components/__tests__/customer-detail-tabs.test.tsx [create]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/customer-screens.jsx [ref]
- prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/modals.jsx [ref]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given the production page renders for an existing customer, when compared to prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/shipping/customer-screens.jsx:132-363, then it has the same 4-tab layout + Address modal trigger + Allergen Restriction modal trigger + Pricing tab P2 scaffold — verified by RTL snapshot + parity checklist + Playwright trace.
2. Given URL ?tab=allergens, when page renders, then Allergens tab is active and renders chip list with QA-only Add button (gated by ship.allergen.override).
3. Given the customer has no shipping address, when Addresses tab renders, then a V-SHIP-SO-02 advisory banner appears ("At least one shipping address is required before SO confirmation") with no client-side block.
4. Given session lacks ship.allergen.override, when Allergens tab renders, then Add Restriction button is hidden.
5. UI closeout includes Playwright trace + screenshot evidence per `_meta/atomic-tasks/UI-PROTOTYPE-PARITY-POLICY.md`; if Playwright unavailable, blocker documented and RTL fallback attached.

## Test strategy
- RED: RTL asserting tab routing + modal triggers + V-SHIP-SO-02 banner + permission gate + four states.
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run customer-detail-tabs.test.tsx`.
- Playwright `apps/web/e2e/shipping-customer-detail.spec.ts` captures multi-tab evidence.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import `@radix-ui/react-dialog` outside `packages/ui`.
- Do not paste prototype JSX verbatim.
- Do not enforce V-SHIP-SO-02 client-side as a block (server-side at SO confirm only).
- Do not implement Pricing tab features (Phase 2 per BL-SHIP-09).
- Do not regress accessibility.
